name: Cheesy Chicken Rolls
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 oz Jar of sliced Mushrooms, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 4 medium, boneless, skinless chicken breast halves (totaling 12 ounces).
2. For the filling, combine cheese, mushrooms, 1/4 cup yogurt, chives, parsley, and pimento in a small bowl.
3. Place one chicken breast half with the boned side up between two pieces of clear plastic wrap. Pound lightly from the center to the edges until 1/8 inch thick. Remove plastic wrap. Repeat with remaining chicken.
4. Spread some filling on each chicken breast half. Fold in the sides and roll up.
5. Arrange rolls seam-side down in a 10x6x2-inch baking dish.
6. Combine bread crumbs and paprika. Brush yogurt on top of each chicken roll and sprinkle with crumb mixture.
7. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is tender and no longer pink.
Note: Per serving, this recipe contains 205 calories, 32 grams protein, 4 grams carbohydrates, 6 grams fat, 82 milligrams cholesterol, and 298 milligrams sodium.
